title: 18, 19-year-old plead guilty in 2024 Dorchester killing
author: Carson Lyle
bullets: Crime “I extend my deepest sympathies to the family and friends of Leudis Mejia Sanchez, whose last act in life was a valiant effort to help his son,” Hayden said.

Jonathan Wiggs/The Boston Globe Two young men pleaded guilty to manslaughter on Tuesday for their part in a 2024 shooting of a Dorchester father and son that left the father dead, prosecutors said.
